title: Arbitrum Reaches $18 Billion TVL Across Its Ecosystem
description: The Arbitrum network has reached a significant milestone, crossing the $18 billion mark in total value locked (TVL), representing 35% growth over the past month. The Ethereum Layer 2 solution now controls nearly 60% of the entire Layer 2 market, cementing its position as the dominant scaling solution in today's DeFi landscape.
lead: Arbitrum's TVL has surpassed $18 billion, up 35% over the past month
author: Editorial

mark in total value locked (TVL), representing 35% growth over the past month. The Ethereum Layer 2 solution now controls nearly 60% of the entire Layer 2 market, cementing its position as the dominant scaling solution in today's DeFi landscape.
Arbitrum's TVL growth is driven primarily by increased activity across major DeFi protocols:
This growth coincides with recent technological upgrades and ecosystem expansion. The network processed more than
over the past 24 hours, while the average transaction cost remains below $0.50 - a stark contrast to Ethereum mainnet fees, which often exceed $15 during peak load.
The ecosystem's growth is confirmed by the launch of several new protocols and the migration of existing projects from other networks.
protocols are showing particular interest in Arbitrum's infrastructure, choosing the network for its lower operating costs and fast settlement times.

governance token responded positively to the ecosystem's growth, gaining 18% over the past week. The Arbitrum DAO recently approved several key proposals, including a $200 million fund for ecosystem development and liquidity provider incentives.
Competition among Layer 2 solutions remains intense, with
also demonstrating strong growth metrics. However, Arbitrum's first-mover advantage in the Optimistic Rollup space and its robust developer ecosystem continue to drive adoption.
The network now hosts more than
, up from 180 six months ago. Arbitrum's roadmap includes further decentralization measures and the potential introduction of native yield-bearing assets.
